name: Murder Drones: Cooper-7 Chronicles
description: Dive into Cooper-7, a grim exoplanet in the Murder Drones universe! As a human mysteriously stranded on this abandoned JCJenson colony, you'll face Worker Drones, corporate secrets, and lurking dangers. Every choice shapes a unique story packed with dark humor, thrilling action, tragedy, and optional romance. Explore mines, ruins, and labs, meet original characters, and uncover the planet's hidden truths. No two adventures are the same-forge your own epic tale in this sarcastic, post-apocalyptic nightmare!
creator: Drolraw456
